headline: Debunking GameStop CEO Ryan Cohen's bizarre eBay claims
summary: GameStop (GME) CEO Ryan Cohen made an offer to buy eBay (EBAY), which was rejected. Hennion & Walsh chief investment officer Kevin Mahn and Yahoo Finance Senior Reporter Brooke DiPalma chat with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about eBay's stock and earnings performance, contrasting Cohen's claims.

headline: Forget GameStop: This Stock Is A Much Better Buy
summary: Wall Street’s chat rooms can’t stop talking about GameStop (NYSE:GME) after Ryan Cohen’s $56 billion offer for eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) sent the meme crowd into another frenzy. But here’s what you should actually be watching. The eBay bid is theater dressed up as strategy. Polymarket traders price the odds of GameStop actually closing the deal at ... Forget GameStop: This Stock Is A Much Better Buy

headline: bidadoo Reports Robust Q1 2026 Growth as Online Equipment Remarketing Demand Surges
summary: bidadoo, the largest and most trusted online auction service on eBay for the heavy equipment and commercial truck industry, announced record-breaking results for the first quarter of 2026. Building on its strategic partnership with eBay, bidadoo achieved a 22% year-over-year increase in Sales, underscoring a continued industry shift toward transparent, online-first remarketing solutions. With diesel prices at record highs, buyer's premiums at 10% to 15%, bidadoo's sell-in-place model has buyers

headline: GameStop’s Ryan Cohen Presses Ahead With Hostile Pursuit of eBay (GME)
summary: GameStop (NYSE:GME) chief executive Ryan Cohen has renewed his threat to launch a hostile takeover bid for eBay (NASDAQ:EBAY) after the company rejected his acquisition proposal earlier this week, according to a report from the Financial Times on Wednesday. According to the report, Cohen sent a letter on Wednesday to eBay chairman Paul Pressler criticizing the company’s decision to dismiss the unsolicited $125-per-share proposal without engaging in detailed discussions.

headline: eBay rejects GameStop’s ‘neither credible nor attractive’ offer
summary: Secondhand platform eBay has rejected a proposal from GameStop, which sought to acquire a 100% stake in the site calling the offer “neither credible nor attractive”.

raw.headline: eBay rejects GameStop’s ‘neither credible nor attractive’ offer

headline: GameStop plans shareholder appeal after eBay rejection – report
summary: In an email to eBay chair Paul Pressler, GameStop CEO Cohen expressed disapproval at the board's refusal to engage with GameStop's proposal or even agree to a meeting.

headline: GameStop CEO Calls eBay Leadership a “Bunch of Losers” After Bid Rejection

headline: Ryan Cohen Slams eBay Board After GameStop's $56 Billion Bid Rejected, Says Shareholders Should Vote On His Offer: 'Run By A Bunch Of Losers'
summary: One day after eBay Inc. (NASDAQ:EBAY) dismissed the $56 billion takeover proposal as "neither credible nor attractive," GameStop Corp. (NYSE:GME) CEO Ryan Cohen fired back in a letter to Chairman Paul Pressler and in an interview with Piers Morgan, criticizing management and signaling he may intensify his efforts. headline: Is It Too Late To Consider eBay (EBAY) After A 66% One Year Surge?
summary: Considering whether eBay at US$113.01 still offers value after a strong run, or if the easy money has already been made. The stock has recently posted returns of 4.5% over 7 days, 15.1% over 30 days, 29.8% year to date and 65.7% over 1 year, with 172.2% over 3 years and 106.3% over 5 years. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in large consumer platforms and how they are priced relative to peers and broader equity markets. Investors are paying closer attention to how...
